title: parlatoria cakiloidea
intro: Parlatoria cakiloidea, also known as the Kukui or Candlenut tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in Hawaii. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Parlatoria cakiloidea include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide relief from arthritis and other joint pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include oil extracted from its seeds, which can be used as a natural remedy for various health issues, and the leaves can be made into a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
